mapper.select:
SELECT T.TRAVEL_NO, T.TRAVEL_TITLE, T.VISIBILITY, T.STATUS, T.CREATE_DATE, T.MODIFY_DATE, T.COUNT, T.MEMBER_NO, T.SCHEDULE_NO, M.NICKNAME AS NICKNAME, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NICE N WHERE N.POST_NO = T.TRAVEL_NO) AS LIKE_COUNT FROM TRAVEL_LIST T JOIN MEMBER M ON T.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO WHERE T.STATUS = 'Y' AND T.VISIBILITY IN ('PUBLIC','MEMBER')
AND T.TRAVEL_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND T.REGION = #{region}
ORDER BY
LIKE_COUNT DESC
T.COUNT DESC
T.CREATE_DATE DESC
OFFSET (#{pi.currentPage} - 1) * #{pi.boardLimit} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pi.boardLimit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_TRAVEL_SUB_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TRAVEL_LIST_SUB (TRAVEL_SUB_NO, TRAVEL_SUB_CONTENT, TRAVEL_SUB_SEQ, TRAVEL_SUB_DATE, TRAVEL_NO, CONTENT_ID, RATING, CONTENT_TITLE) VALUES (#{travelSubNo}, #{travelSubContent}, #{travelSubSeq}, SYSDATE, #{travelNo}, #{contentId}, #{rating, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{contentTitle})
INSERT INTO TB_IMAGE (IMAGE_NO, IMAGE_PATH, FILE_NAME, RENAME_FILE, TRAVEL_SUB_NO) VALUES (SEQ_IMAGE_NO.NEXTVAL, #{imagePath}, #{fileName}, #{renameFile}, #{travelSubNo})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T.TRAVEL_NO) FROM TRAVEL_LIST T LEFT JOIN TRAVEL_LIST_SUB TS ON T.TRAVEL_NO = TS.TRAVEL_NO WHERE T.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND T.STATUS = 'Y'
AND T.TRAVEL_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND (TS.CONTENT_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR TS.TRAVEL_SUB_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND ( T.TRAVEL_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR TS.CONTENT_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR TS.TRAVEL_SUB_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

SELECT DISTINCT T.TRAVEL_NO, T.TRAVEL_TITLE AS travelTitle, T.CREATE_DATE AS createDate, RP.REPORT_STATUS AS reportStatus FROM TRAVEL_LIST T LEFT JOIN REPORT RP ON T.TRAVEL_NO = RP.TARGET_NO AND RP.TARGET_TYPE = 'travel' AND RP.REPORT_STATUS = 'N' LEFT JOIN TRAVEL_LIST_SUB TS ON T.TRAVEL_NO = TS.TRAVEL_NO
WHERE T.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND T.STATUS = 'Y'
AND T.TRAVEL_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND (TS.CONTENT_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR TS.TRAVEL_SUB_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND ( T.TRAVEL_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR TS.CONTENT_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR TS.TRAVEL_SUB_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY T.TRAVEL_NO DESC OFFSET #{startRow} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{listLimit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT T.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NICE N WHERE N.POST_NO = T.TRAVEL_NO) AS LIKE_COUNT FROM TRAVEL_LIST T WHERE T.TRAVEL_NO = #{travelNo} AND T.STATUS = 'Y'

select s.travel_sub_no, s.travel_sub_content, s.travel_sub_seq, s.travel_sub_date, s.travel_no, s.content_id, s.rating, s.content_title, l.mapy as lat, l.mapx as lng from travel_list_sub s left join landmark l on s.content_id = l.content_id where s.travel_no = #{travelNo} order by s.travel_sub_seq
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NICE ( NICE_NO, POST_NO, MEMBER_NO, POST_BOARD_FX ) VALUES ( SEQ_NICE_NO.NEXTVAL, #{travelNo}, #{memberNo}, 'TR' )
mapper.select: SELECT T.TRAVEL_NO, T.TRAVEL_TITLE, T.STATUS, T.CREATE_DATE, T.MEMBER_NO, TS.TRAVEL_SUB_NO, TS.TRAVEL_SUB_CONTENT, TS.TRAVEL_SUB_SEQ, TS.TRAVEL_SUB_DATE, TS.CONTENT_ID, TS.RATING, TS.CONTENT_TITLE FROM TRAVEL_LIST T LEFT JOIN TRAVEL_LIST_SUB TS ON T.TRAVEL_NO = TS.TRAVEL_NO WHERE T.TRAVEL_NO = #{travelNo} ORDER BY TS.TRAVEL_SUB_SEQ

SELECT M.TRAVEL_NO, M.TRAVEL_TITLE, M.STATUS, M.CREATE_DATE, M.MEMBER_NO, M.TRAVEL_START_DATE, M.TRAVEL_END_DATE, S.TRAVEL_SUB_NO, S.TRAVEL_SUB_CONTENT, S.TRAVEL_SUB_SEQ, S.CONTENT_ID, S.RATING, S.CONTENT_TITLE, L.MAPY AS LAT, L.MAPX AS LNG, I.IMAGE_PATH FROM TRAVEL_LIST M LEFT JOIN TRAVEL_LIST_SUB S ON M.TRAVEL_NO = S.TRAVEL_NO LEFT JOIN LANDMARK L ON S.CONTENT_ID = L.CONTENT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_IMAGE I ON S.TRAVEL_SUB_NO = I.TRAVEL_SUB_NO WHERE M.TRAVEL_NO = #{travelNo}
